name: Maryland
why_ruby_pro: Maryland ATCC licensing compliance enforced across all 24 county jurisdictions
County-based license rules applied automatically at order entry
Maryland Comptroller excise reporting built into every transaction
problem: Maryland's 24-county licensing system tracked manually per account
Comptroller excise filings built from scattered delivery and billing records
ATCC audit requests expose gaps in paper-based compliance tracking
difference: County-specific ATCC license status checked before every order ships
Maryland excise rates calculated per SKU and rolled up by filing period
Built-in Comptroller reporting from live order data — no re-entry required
how_it_works: Each account tagged with county jurisdiction and ATCC license details
Excise totals aggregated per period for Maryland Comptroller submission
Route dashboards show territory performance across all Maryland counties
